name: INtLOVErt Game Club
short_description: A lot of unique Japanese nerds appear one after another! Let's enjoy the exciting daily life with him, a member of the nerds circle who is interested in you!
detailed_description:
This is a romance-style novel game in which all the characters to be attacked are only shady characters.

A lot of unique Japanese nerds appear one after another!

Let's enjoy the exciting daily life with him, a member of the nerds circle who is interested in you!

In this world where cheerful people abound

Everyone dreams at least once...

It's...

To captive all the nerds!

All of the targets are “Japanese nerds”!

A new sensation! A novel game in the style of romance!

＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝

You, the main character, are a university student who truly loves the “Japanese nerds”.

Spring break is over, and for the first time in two months, you step into Eisei University, the school you attend,

There...

Mr. Japanese nerds was bullied by the harmful cheerful people!!!

I just helped Mr. Japanese nerds with my hot pathos,

He asked me to be the next president of a circle of Japanese nerds... ？？？？

＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝

This work is a work of fiction.

It is in no way related to any real person or organization.

This work contains the following depictions by characters.

This work does not affirm the following.

Violence

Discrimination

Sexual descriptions (no stills that exceed the all-ages classification, which prevents distribution, etc.)

Other descriptions that may be offensive. Please be careful when playing.
